title: Brick (scavenger)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Brick}}
[[File:Salvagers-DE1-P01.jpg|thumb|right|A scavenger team including Brick and Slag.]]
'''Brick''' was the leader of a [[Scavenger/Legends|scavenger]] party in the aftermath of the [[Second Battle of Coruscant]] during the [[Imperial Civil War]].

==Biography==
Brick had a good deal of scavenging experience, and was fond of the scavenger lifestyle. He was known to try to convince others of its appeal. He amassed an arsenal of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and other assorted tools and tricks to assist in his occupation.<ref name="SW:DEa">[[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire'' audio drama]]</ref>

When the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] landed on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to rescue the crew of the [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']], Brick's team, including fellow scavenger [[Slag (scavenger)|Slag]], descended on the ''Falcon'' to strip it of valuable parts.
When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] tried to dissuade them, Brick activated a remote to release a pack of [[Nek/Legends|neks]] from his ship. The neks were stopped by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] use of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="SW:DEa" /><ref name="DE1">[[Dark Empire 1|''Dark Empire'' 1]]</ref>

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Brick and Slag were created for the ''Dark Empire'' audio drama, and based on their dialogue it can be definitively stated that they are among the scavengers atop the ''Millennium Falcon'' in the first issue of the ''Dark Empire'' comic series.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire'' audio drama]]
